dataset: Portland Parks (OpenStreetMap) and Multnomah County 2020 Census Tracts

pi_items.verified_value: OpenStreetMap parks, recreation areas, and greenspaces queried via Overpass API for Portland metro bounding box (45.43-45.60°N, -122.84--122.47°W)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 34-116 downloads from https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter with query for leisure=park, recreation_ground, nature_reserve, garden, playground

pi_items.verified_value: US Census Bureau TIGER 2020 census tracts for Oregon (FIPS 41), filtered to Multnomah County (FIPS 051), with 2020 PL94-171 population data (P1_001N total population)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 126-206 downloads from https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2020/TRACT/tl_2020_41_tract.zip and Census API https://api.census.gov/data/2020/dec/pl

Task description specifies all four fields exactly; export_result.sh line 74 checks for these exact field names; verifier.py line 97 lists identical fields
setup_task.sh line 323 saves ground truth to this location

pi_items.verified_value: EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N) is correct for Portland, Oregon; covers Western Oregon and Pacific Northwest region
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 235 uses EPSG:32610; verified via https://epsg.io/32610 that this is standard UTM Zone 10N covering Portland area

pi_items.source: Task description lines 30-35 and setup_task.sh lines 290-295 define identical thresholds

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, publicly available geospatial data: OpenStreetMap parks and recreation areas queried via Overpass API for Portland metro (coordinates 45.43-45.60°N, -122.84--122.47°W) and US Census Bureau TIGER 2020 census tracts for Multnomah County (Oregon FIPS 41, Multnomah FIPS 051). Population data comes from 2020 Census PL94-171 redistricting file via Census API (variable P1_001N = total population). All area calculations must use projected CRS EPSG:32610 (UTM Zone 10N), not geographic degrees. The task defines park coverage as four fields per tract: park_area_sqm (float), tract_area_sqm (float), park_pct (2 decimals), and greenspace_tier (categorical: adequate ≥10%, marginal 5-9.99%, deficient <5%). The expected outputs are a GeoJSON FeatureCollection at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/park_coverage_by_tract.geojson and a CSV summary at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/greenspace_equity_summary.csv with rows for each tier showing tract count, total population, and average park coverage percentage.
